title: Parrya runcinata
taxonomy: Parrya runcinata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a member of the genus Parrya. The plant is native to Central Asia. Within the Brassicaceae family, Parrya runcinata is closely related to other plants such as Arabis and Draba. As a result, it is often placed in the tribe Arabideae.

Its roots and leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever and pain.
